'''Aleema Keto's pet''' was an unknown [[Species/Legends|species]] of serpentine constrictor owned by [[Aleema Keto]], who used the beast to kill dissenters to the rule of her [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] government. Aleema often used this pet as a [[Torture/Legends|torture]] and execution device. It secreted a yellow mucus from its quills. Aleema liked to eat the quills, apparently finding the mucus tasty.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This creature, never given a name, appears to be a living thing rather than one of Aleema's many [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Mind trick/Legends|illusions]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 3|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 3]] {{1st}}
